allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add bulk asset-to-infrastructure sync \(Issue #62\)

- Add bulkSyncAssetsToInfra\(\) service for syncing assets to infra_devices
- Add POST /infrastructure/sync-assets endpoint with audit logging
- Add "Sync from Assets" button to Infrastructure page with status toast
- Refactor color constants to shared data-viz-colors module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add bulk asset-to-infrastructure sync \(Issue #62\)

- Add bulkSyncAssetsToInfra\(\) service for syncing all assets to infra_devices
- Add POST /infrastructure/sync-assets endpoint with RBAC and audit logging
- Add "Sync from Assets" button to Infrastructure page with status toast

Closes #62

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add bulk asset sync and centralize data-viz colors \(#62, #91\)

Issue #62 — Bulk Asset-to-Infrastructure Sync:
- Add bulkSyncAssetsToInfra\(\) service for syncing all assets to infra_devices
- Add POST /infrastructure/sync-assets endpoint with RBAC and audit logging
- Add "Sync from Assets" button to Infrastructure page with status toast

Issue #91 — Data-Viz Color Strategy:
- Create frontend/src/styles/data-viz-colors.ts as single source of truth
- Refactor 8 infra components to import from central palette
- Add ADR docs/adr/002-brand-tokens-vs-dataviz-colors.md

Closes #62, closes #91

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
